issues.description: Condition missing: must check for 2+ Characters with Amazon Lily or Kuja Pirates types on your field. Current condition is 'Always'.

Action type is 'KO' but effect text says 'place at the bottom of the owner's deck' — this is a return/reorder effect, not destruction. Should use 'ReturnToHand' or similar deck placement mechanism, or custom action if system supports deck positioning.
Target scope is 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' but effect allows choosing your own Character or opponent's Character (it says 'owner's deck'). Should be 'ChooseCharacter' or clarify scope.
Effect says 'up to 1' (optional), but DSL structure doesn't reflect optionality. May need quantity modifier.
